name: Jenkins
description: CI/CD automation server. Monitor build pipelines and deployment compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Jenkins server
2. Click your username (top-right) → Configure
3. Under API Token, click Add new Token → Generate
4. Copy the token
5. Enter your Jenkins URL below
6. Use your Jenkins username and the API token as the password

credentialFields.label: Jenkins URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Jenkins server URL (e.g. https://jenkins.yourcompany.com). No trailing slash.

checks.name: Jenkins CI/CD Pipeline
checks.description: Verifies CI/CD pipelines are configured in Jenkins.
